narrative:
Delphos 2B (precinct in Allen County) has 350 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.6 percentage points.
